race.comment: Tough contest with plenty of chances. RICH STAR (2) lightly raced gelding heading in the right direction. Chasing his third-straight victory at this course and gets in light with Smyth's 3kg claim. The one to beat. GAYLORD (1) due for a change of luck and comes here in peak condition. Saves his best for this course and distance and shapes as the main danger. STORM MERCHANT (8) displayed good ability in his maiden prep and has trialled well in the lead up. Drawn favourably and has to be respected. ENHANCE (9) is prone to mixing his form, but is capable when right. Next best.
